target.title: fix(update): prune stale local bundled plugin shadows
target.body:
## Summary
- Add a version-aware stale local bundled-plugin install-record detector for official bundled plugin IDs.
- Prune those stale records during post-core update convergence before repair/smoke checks run.
- Teach `openclaw doctor --fix` to warn on and remove stale local bundled install-record shadows while preserving current, same-version, versionless, source-checkout, and arbitrary local path records.
- Add a changelog entry and explicit sort comparators so the lint shard accepts the new deterministic iteration.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/plugins/stale-local-bundled-plugin-install-records.test.ts src/cli/update-cli/post-core-plugin-convergence.test.ts src/commands/doctor-plugin-registry.test.ts`
  - 3 files passed, 31 tests passed.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint-shards.mjs --threads=8`
  - core/extensions/scripts all reported 0 warnings and 0 errors.
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 CHANGELOG.md src/plugins/stale-local-bundled-plugin-install-records.ts src/commands/doctor-plugin-registry.ts`
  - all matched files use the correct format.
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof
**Behavior addressed:** A stale persisted path install record for an official bundled plugin can make old compiled bundled output, such as `old-checkout/dist/extensions/discord`, shadow the current bundled plugin after an update. This patch removes only stale compiled bundled path records so the current bundled plugin wins again.

**Real environment tested:** Local OpenClaw source checkout on macOS with the PR branch checked out at `97e2080a85b1c2df15465b038947f1c68b54bba6`, isolated temporary `HOME` and `OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR`, and a temporary trusted bundled plugin root containing a current `discord` plugin at `2026.5.20-beta.1` plus a stale compiled `discord` path record at `2026.5.4-beta.3`.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:** Ran a local terminal command with `node --import tsx --input-type=module` that created the temporary OpenClaw setup, loaded the plugin registry before pruning with the stale install record, called `pruneStaleLocalBundledPluginInstallRecords`, then loaded the plugin registry again with the pruned records.

**Evidence after fix:** Copied terminal output from the hermetic runtime command:

```json
{
  "before": [
    {
      "id": "discord",
      "origin": "global",
      "version": "2026.5.4-beta.3"
    }
  ],
  "staleRemoved": [
    {
      "pluginId": "discord",
      "recordPathField": "installPath"
    }
  ],
  "remainingInstallRecords": [],
  "after": [
    {
      "id": "discord",
      "origin": "bundled",
      "version": "2026.5.20-beta.1"
    }
  ]
}
```

**Observed result after fix:** Before pruning, `discord` resolved from the stale global path at `2026.5.4-beta.3`. After pruning, the stale `installPath` record was removed, no install records remained for `discord`, and the registry resolved `discord` from the current bundled plugin at `2026.5.20-beta.1`.

**What was not tested:** Full end-to-end updater restart on a packaged beta install was not run locally; the post-core convergence and doctor repair call paths are covered by the targeted tests listed above.

The helper keeps non-stale local overrides covered by tests: current bundled paths, same-version compiled paths, versionless compiled paths, source-checkout `extensions/<id>` paths, and arbitrary local plugin paths are not pruned.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
